name: Applications
author: Taako
description: A configurable Discord application/form cog with panels, DM questionnaires, review buttons, role actions, CSV exports, and polls.
install_msg: Applications loaded. Use `[p]application create` to create a form, `[p]application question add` to add questions, and `[p]application panel` to post an apply panel.
short: Application forms with panels, review buttons, role actions, exports, and polls.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild application configuration, panel message IDs, poll records, applicant user IDs, application responses, reviewer user IDs, votes, and role/channel IDs.
